windows.changelog:
- Incremental charts added 
 - Position vs velocity interactor added 
 - IMU charts interactor added 
 - More accurate auto-tuning algorithm for the rear wheel 
 - Run comparison improved 
 - Linkage export for software simulation 
 - Bug fixes

- Save runs as new .byb file without stops 
 - Accelerometer and gyro distribution added 
 - Lap manager improved 
 - Positive and negative average for accelerometer and gyro 
 - Zoom-in charts improved 
 - Bug fixes
